title: David Silver
excerpts:
Section Title: Home > About
Content:
I build AI that learns for itself to solve problems that humans can’t.
I am the CEO of Ineffable Intelligence. Until recently, I led the reinforcement learning team at DeepMind. I am also a professor at University College London.

title: Comments to "Welcome to the Era of Experience" by David Silver and Richard Sutton
excerpts:
Section Title: Comments to "Welcome to the Era of Experience" by David Silver and Richard Sutton
Content:
[](https://substack.com/@yuxili)
[Yuxi Li](https://substack.com/@yuxili)
Apr 14, 2025
8
[](https://yuxili.substack.com/p/comments-to-welcome-to-the-era-of/comments) 1
Share
David Silver and Richard Sutton recently shared a paper: [Welcome to the Era of Experience](http://goo.gle/3EiRKIH) . It is highly recommended, esp. for people pursuing true agents and AI.
This is their first written perspective on LLMs.
Some of their talks and interviews:
[Is Human Data Enough? With David Silver](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=zzXyPGEtseI) ;
[David Silver - Towards Superhuman Intelligence - RLC 2024](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=pkpJMNjvgXw) ;
[A Perspective on Intelligence by Rich Sutton](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=w177Ov-Y3gc) ;
[DeepSeek (The Derby Mill Series ep 02)](https://insights.intrepidgp.com/p/dm-ep2-deepseek) ;

title: DeepMind’s David Silver on games, beauty, and AI’s potential to avert human-made disasters - Bulletin of the Atomic Scientists
excerpts:
Section Title: DeepMind’s David Silver on games, beauty, and AI’s potential to avert human-made disasters
Content:
Then, during a pivotal match between AlphaGo and the world champion, he had an epiphany: Perhaps the machine should have no human influence at all. That idea became AlphaGo Zero, the successor to AlphaGo that received “zero” human knowledge about how to play well. Instead, AlphaGo Zero relies only on the game’s rules and reinforcement learning. It beat AlphaGo [100 games to zero](https://deepmind.com/blog/article/alphago-zero-starting-scratch) .
[](https://igfn.us/form/Q_JW1A)
David Silver led the DeepMind team that developed AlphaGo—the first program to beat a world champion at the ancient Chinese game of go. Photo credit: Marco Rubens. Used with permission.

title: Driverless Trucks Will Be On The Highway - David Silver
excerpts: Mar 18, 2026 — The New York Times has a story out about Kodiak and other autonomous vehicle companies that are planning to go driverless on the highway

title: I love self-driving trucks! - David Silver
excerpts:
[](https://davidsilver.blog/)
[David Silver](https://davidsilver.blog/)
I love self-driving trucks!
[Twitter](https://twitter.com/dsilver829)
[Medium](https://medium.com/@dsilver829)
[LinkedIn](https://linkedin.com/in/dsilver829)
Email
Menu
[📫](https://davidsilver.blog/subscribe/)
[🔍](https://davidsilver.blog/search/)
[ℹ️](https://davidsilver.blog/about/)
Hello 👋 I’m David Silver. I write about self-driving cars and trucks and autonomous vehicles, generally.
I am a software engineer at [Kodiak](https://kodiak.ai/) , on the Planning, Controls, and Simulation Team. Self-driving trucks are amazing and I am fortunate to work them!
Earlier, I was at [Cruise](https://getcruise.com/) , in the Motion Planning & Controls group. Cruise acquired [Voyage](https://voyage.auto) , my previous employer, where I was an engineer on the Decision-Making Team.
